usage: report_preserves [-help] [-computed] [-obj_type {design hinst module inst net hnet pin hpin base_cell}] [-dont_touch  | -dont_use ]

options.name: -computed
options.description: Include Include computed attributes that include inheritance .dont_touch_effective, .dont_touch_sources, .read_only_effective, and .dont_use_cells_effective attributes in the report, unless filtered by -dont_touch or -don't_use. This will cause all objects that inherit a non-default value from a parent or the library to appear in the report.

options.name: -dont_touch
options.description: Only report non-default attributes related to dont_touch: .dont_touch*, .read_only*, is_ilm.

options.name: -dont_use
options.description: Only report non-default attributes related to dont_use: .dont_use_cells*, .use_cells*

options.name: -obj_type
options.description: {design hinst module inst net hnet pin hpin base_cell} Only report on specific object types.
